title: Dr. Syn, Alias the Scarecrow
writer: William Buchanan, Russell Thorndike, Robert Westerby
actors: Patrick McGoohan, George Cole, Tony Britton
plot: In eighteenth century England, the mysterious masked rider known as the Scarecrow (Patrick McGoohan) leads a rebel band to save the town of Romney Marsh from King George III's (Eric Pohlmann's) oppression and Naval press gangs.
